name: Krampus is Home
short_description: Sebastian is a teenager who is waiting for his parents to come back home on a cold Christmas night. Soon he realizes that there is something evil lurking around. Experience Sebastian 's journey into a surreal world like no other.
detailed_description:
OUR NEW GAME

Please consider adding Shadows of the Werewolf to your Wishlist, our newly announced horror game.


About the Game

Inspired from Central European folklore, Krampus is an ancient creature who punishes children who have misbehaved during the Christmas season. This game is about survival, you can be stealthy, you can also run away or defend yourself from some enemies. The enemies have been developed with advanced artificial intelligence, thus they are very unpredictable. This game has a story mode and then a survival mode that unlocks once the story mode is completed.

KEY FEATURES

  • Survival horror.

  • First person point of view.

  • Survival and Stealth mechanics.

  • Action-packed.

  • Cinematic visuals.

  • Story-driven gameplay with many locations.

  • Survival mode.

  • Advanced Artificial Intelligence.

  • Various enemies with different mechanics each.

  • Contains Jump scares.

  • Steam achievements.

MULTIPLAYER

  • Cooperative and competitive team matches (PvP / PvE) of up to 7 players in the same match.

  • You can play as various characters, including monsters.

  • Lobby text chat.

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil, German, Korean, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, French, Italian, Polish, Turkish, Japanese, Czech
*languages with full audio support
